summary: Comprehensive testing of photographer workflow and notifications - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 20/20 tests passed covering surf spots, go-live/end-session, gallery CRUD, AI tagging (suggest-tags, confirm-tags), notifications (photo_tagged type), my-tagged-photos, and Find Buddies skill filtering. Frontend: All key UI components verified including Bookings page Find Buddies tab with skill filters, Photo Tools with Live Sessions and surf spot dropdown, My Gallery with upload functionality, and Notifications page showing photo_tagged notifications correctly.

minor.issue: 404/400 errors shown in console for some resources (likely missing avatar images or user data) - non-blocking

issues: Minor: HTML hydration warning for <span> inside <option> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are working correctly
AI tagging workflow (suggest-tags -> confirm-tags -> notification creation) is fully functional
Surf spot dropdown is properly integrated in Session Settings modal
Find Buddies skill filtering works with all levels (All, Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, Expert)
photo_tagged notifications are created and displayed correctly with 'You were tagged in a photo!' message
seed_data_creation: Created test gallery items and notifications via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified complete photographer workflow: 1) Go-live creates session, 2) End-session creates gallery, 3) Gallery accepts photo uploads, 4) AI tagging (suggest-tags analyzes photos, confirm-tags tags surfers and creates notifications), 5) photo_tagged notifications appear in surfer's notification panel with 'You were tagged in a photo!' message. Find Buddies skill filtering working. All frontend components verified: Sessions Settings has surf spot dropdown, My Gallery has upload feature, Notifications shows photo_tagged correctly.

backend: GET /api/surf-spots - Returns surf spot list for dropdown
POST /api/photographer/{id}/go-live - Start live session with surf spot
POST /api/ai/confirm-tags - Tag surfers, creates photo_tagged notification
GET /api/ai/my-tagged-photos - Photos user is tagged in (preview only)
frontend: Bookings page with Live Sessions, Find Buddies, Scheduled tabs
Find Buddies tab with skill level filter buttons (All/Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced/Expert)
Photo Tools sidebar menu (My Gallery, Bookings Manager, Live Sessions)
Live Sessions page with Go Live button and Settings
Session Settings modal with Surf Spot dropdown
My Gallery page with Upload Photo functionality
